comment: MERGED upstream work only, in display order (§6.3). Open PRs flow through Recent Activity automatically with live states, so they never go stale. The pipeline re-verifies every state on each run.

curated.note: W3C File API surface implemented in Zig for an AI-agent headless browser.
Build-system fix accepted into the reference Python implementation.
DataFusion expressions for merge-insert predicates in a production columnar format.
Stopped budget enforcement on model-discovery and info routes.
The same DataFusion capability carried into LanceDB's Rust core.
Moved embedding search onto a dedicated executor to stop event-loop stalls.
Completed file-input support, from FileList through DOM.setFileInputFiles.
Added a proxy-wide setting to disable budget reservation.
Fixed opaque AttributeError for bare List/Tuple generics in Pydantic schema conversion, raising a clear TypeError instead.
Replaced panic paths in the Bedrock embedding provider with typed error returns across serialization, API, and runtime failure modes.
Stopped a cancelled stream from stranding its max_parallel_requests slot, which had been pinning capped keys at their limit.
Surfaced max_input_tokens and max_output_tokens on /v1/models for accurate client-side capacity planning.
Enabled Anthropic-native model discovery for Claude Code gateway deployments.
Implemented Browser.setDownloadBehavior for CDP-driven file download automation.
Fixed incorrect evaluation of list-element docs in the FTS prefilter walk-the-allowlist branch.
Critical fix: merge_insert silently dropped matched rows when the leading payload column was all-null.
Fixed incorrect reboot/pending logic in sysupdate when --component= is used. First PR merged into systemd.
Preserved cache_control headers for OpenAI-compatible custom endpoints, fixing silent cache bypass.
